nasb.text: then the dust will return to the earth as it was, and the spirit will return to God who gave it.

esv.text: and the dust returns to the earth as it was, and the spirit returns to God who gave it.

cnv.text: 塵土要歸回原來之地，靈要歸回賜靈的　神。

ccb.text: 那时尘土必归于尘土，灵也要归回赐灵的上帝。

csbs.text: 那时尘土要归回大地，像原来那样； 灵也要归回赐灵的神。
